gate.validation: speaker/actor-grouped 5-fold CV + label-permutation significance + top-class ECE
gate.rationale: The repo defines no numeric promotion bar; balanced accuracy is chosen (over raw accuracy) so a skewed class prior cannot inflate the score — consistent with evaluate.ts reporting majority-class accuracy as chance.

priorAffectModel.name: signal-lab-logreg
priorAffectModel.role: population_prior — KEPT (far-domain acted speech, penalty 0.45; did not reach the 80% gate; never hum truth / clinical, ADR-0005)

promoted.note: EXPERIMENTAL far-domain PRIOR that cleared the 80% gate. It is NOT wired to change the runtime affect/intervention read: it is acted-speech (penalty 0.45), a coarse axis, and not hum truth. Surfaced as an auxiliary, gate-passed prior only.

inferenceImpact: Target 'arousal_binary' cleared the experimental gate as a far-domain prior; the 6-class affect head + interventions are UNCHANGED (the 6-class prior did not pass). Inference reports gate status honestly.
